title: Evaluation Enforcement Action
description: Governed enforcement artifact produced by the BU Governor Enforcement Bridge. Translates an evaluation_budget_decision into an explicit enforcement action that promotion/release/change workflows must honor.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this enforcement action.

decision_id.description: The decision_id of the evaluation_budget_decision that drove this enforcement action.

summary_id.description: The summary_id of the evaluation_monitor_summary that originated the governor decision.

status.description: Enforcement status. 'enforced' means the action is binding; 'advisory' means informational; 'failed' means the bridge itself encountered an error.

action_type.description: The concrete enforcement action that downstream workflows must honor.

enforcement_scope.description: The workflow scope to which this enforcement action applies.

allowed_to_proceed.description: Whether the downstream workflow is permitted to proceed. False means the workflow must halt.

reasons.description: Human-readable explanations for the enforcement action.

required_human_actions.description: Explicit actions that a human must take before the workflow may continue.

certification_gate.description: Deterministic control-loop certification gate output. Promotion scope must record certification artifact lineage and fail-closed block reason when certification is not certified/pass.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this enforcement action was created.
